name: Home page shows header navigation and hero CTA links to the configurator
description: Verifies the homepage renders the primary header nav links and that the hero's main CTA takes the visitor into the mat configurator.

planSteps.description: The header shows all five nav links: 'Özellikler', 'Galeri', 'Tasarla', 'S.S.S.', and 'Destek'
The hero section shows the heading text 'Aracının zeminine' followed by 'kusursuz uyum.'
Click the primary hero call-to-action button (the red button below the hero heading, default label 'Aracını Seç')
The browser navigates to a URL whose path is /olusturucu
